mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_dict ( dict_type, dict_code, dict_name, sort, status ) VALUES
(#{dict.dictType}, #{dict.dictCode}, #{dict.dictName}, #{dict.sort}, #{dict.status})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_dict WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND dict_code = #{dictCode}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_dict WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND dict_code = #{dictCode}
SELECT * FROM sys_dict ORDER BY dict_type, sort, dict_code
SELECT * FROM sys_dict WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort, dict_code
SELECT * FROM sys_dict WHERE dict_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dictCode}, '%') ORDER BY dict_type, sort
SELECT * FROM sys_dict WHERE dict_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dictName}, '%') ORDER BY dict_type, sort
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_dict WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND dict_code = #{dictCode}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_dict WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND dict_code = #{dictCode} AND dict_id != #{dictId}
SELECT DISTINCT dict_type FROM sys_dict ORDER BY dict_type
